intended_use: V5med Lung AI is a Computer-Aided Detection (CAD) software designed to assist radiologists in detecting pulmonary nodules (with diameter of 4-30 mm) during CT examinations of the chest for asymptomati
intended_use_full: V5med Lung AI is a Computer-Aided Detection (CAD) software designed to assist radiologists in detecting pulmonary nodules (with diameter of 4-30 mm) during CT examinations of the chest for asymptomatic populations. This software provides adjunctive information to alert radiologists to regions of interest with suspected lung nodules that may otherwise be overlooked. It can be used in a concurrent read mode, where the AI analysis results are displayed alongside the original CT images during either the initial review or any subsequent reviews by the radiologist. V5med Lung AI does not replace the radiologist's critical judgment or diagnostic processes and should not be used in isolation from the original CT series.
target_condition: Pulmonary nodules in chest CT examinations
ground_truth: Not explicitly stated; dataset included screening cases from NLST CT arm
other_metrics: Unaided AUC: 0.734; Aided AUC: 0.830; Difference (Aided-Unaided): 0.0959 (95% CI: 0.0586, 0.1332); Reading time unaided: 133.0 seconds; Reading time aided: 115.9 seconds; Time difference: -17.1 seconds (95% CI: -26.7, -9.0), representing 13% improvement
